scripts.dev: npm run stop:dev && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c red,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c red,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
